name: nonoun-color-tokens
description: Color Tokens by NONOUN — a perceptually-even color-palette + semantic-token generator built on the HCT color space (pure engine, web component, Figma plugin).

scripts.build: npm run gen:figma-assets && npm run gen:categories && tsc && vite build && npm run bundle && npm run gen:figma-ui
scripts.test: npm run gen:figma-assets && npm run gen:categories && npm run bundle && npm run gen:figma-ui && node test/run.mjs
